en.source: Learning improves with small daily sessions.
en.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

en.source: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.
en.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

en.source: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.
en.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

es.source: El aprendizaje mejora con sesiones pequenas cada dia.
es.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

es.source: Hablar con claridad ayuda al oyente a entender cada frase.
es.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

es.source: Una rutina constante hace que la practica sea mas facil de repetir.
es.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

es.source: Necesito comprar un boleto para el proximo tren.
es.target: I need to buy a ticket for the next train.

es.source: Puede indicarme donde esta la puerta de embarque.
es.target: Can you show me where the boarding gate is.

es.source: Tengo experiencia trabajando con equipos pequenos.
es.target: I have experience working with small teams.

es.source: Me gustaria explicar por que soy una buena opcion.
es.target: I would like to explain why I am a good fit.

es.source: Tengo una pregunta sobre la tarea de hoy.
es.target: I have a question about today's assignment.

es.source: Voy a preparar la cena despues de terminar mi practica.
es.target: I will make dinner after I finish my practice.

fr.source: L apprentissage progresse avec de courtes seances quotidiennes.
fr.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

fr.source: Une parole claire aide l auditeur a comprendre chaque phrase.
fr.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

fr.source: Une routine stable rend la pratique plus facile a repeter.
fr.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

de.source: Lernen wird durch kleine tagliche Ubungen besser.
de.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

de.source: Klare Sprache hilft dem Zuhorer, jeden Satz zu verstehen.
de.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

de.source: Eine feste Routine macht das Uben leichter zu wiederholen.
de.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

it.source: Un parlare chiaro aiuta l ascoltatore a capire ogni frase.

it.source: Una routine costante rende la pratica piu facile da ripetere.

ja.source: Mainichi no chiisana renshu de gakushu wa yoku narimasu.

ja.source: Hakkiri hanasu to kikite wa bun o rikai shiyasuku narimasu.

ja.source: Anteishita shukan wa renshu o kurikaeshi yasuku shimasu.

zh.source: Qingchu de shuohua bangzhu tingzhe lijie mei ge juzi.

zh.source: Wending de xiguan rang lianxi geng rongyi chongfu.

ru.source: Chetkaya rech pomogaet slushatelyu ponyat kazhdoe predlozhenie.

ar.source: Al taallum yatahasan maa jalsat saghira yawmiyya.

ar.source: Al kalam al wadih yusaeid al mustami ala fahm kull jumlah.

ko.source: Maeil jageun yeonseubeuro baeumi deo joajimnida.

ko.source: Bunmyeonghan mareun deutneun sarami gak munjangeul ihaehage dowajumnida.

ko.source: Anjeongdoen routine eun yeonseubeul deo swipge banbokhage hamnida.

I would like to buy a ticket for the next train.

ko.source: Jeoneun jageun tim gwa hamkke ilhae bon gyeongheomi itseumnida.
ko.target: I have experience working with small teams.

ko.source: Oneul sukje e daehae jilmuni itseumnida.

ko.source: Yeonseubeul kkeunnaego jeonyeok eul junbi hal geoyeyo.
